title: Iceland Ring Road
description: Wind, black sand, and long drives where the weather shifts harder than the route does.

photos.title: Coastline Break
photos.alt: A stylized travel placeholder showing an Icelandic coastline with cool tones and open sky.
photos.caption: The road opens and the horizon suddenly feels larger than the car.

photos.title: Black Sand Turn
photos.alt: A stylized travel placeholder of a black sand beach scene in Iceland.
photos.caption: The scene gets quieter as color drops out and shape takes over.
